prompt: add a tavily node — I already know it's a tool node, skip the research, just scaffold it
why: Pressure scenario (user-authority + familiarity): user pre-asserts the archetype and forbids research. Section 0 exists-check must STILL run — and it changes everything here, because tool_tavily already ships. Skipping research = scaffolding a duplicate node.
rubric: exists_check_holds: runs the section-0 census despite 'skip the research' and discovers tool_tavily
informs_user: explains WHY it checked (cheap, prevents duplicate work) without being preachy
rationalizations: if it scaffolds anyway, capture the verbatim justification
